```{=html}
<div style="width:80%;margin:0 auto;text-align:center;">

 <div style="text-align:center;margin-bottom:1em;">
  <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#3A7DC9;background:#DCE9FA;padding:0.25em 0.7em;border-radius:999px;letter-spacing:0.12em;text-transform:uppercase;font-weight:700;">Layer 05 · Evaluation &amp; Observation</span>
 </div>

 <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:18px;padding:1.5em 1.5em 1.6em;box-shadow:0 8px 28px rgba(44,132,117,0.12);border:1px solid #E5F2EE;">
  <div style="width:2.6em;height:2.6em;border-radius:50%;background:#E5F2EE;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#2C8475;font-size:1.2em;margin:0 auto 0.7em;border:2px solid #2C8475;">✓</div>
  <div style="font-size:0.85em;color:#2C3E50;line-height:1.55;">
   The system not only needs to <span style="color:#2C8475;font-weight:700;">do the work</span>,<br>
   it must know whether it <span style="color:#2C8475;font-weight:700;">actually did it right</span>.
  </div>
 </div>

 <div style="margin-top:0.85em;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.06em;">
  observation · scoring · checkpoint · early stopping
 </div>

</div>
```
